title.en: Monsoon Dreams in the Neon Canyon

description.ko: 디지털 빛과 빗줄기가 뒤엉킨 미래 도시의 낭만적이고도 우울한 묘사.
description.en: A romantic yet moody depiction of a futuristic city where digital light and rain intertwine.

prompt: A vertical cinematic low-angle shot of a rainy cyberpunk alleyway in NEON-V. Towering #1A0033 skyscrapers are adorned with massive 3D holograms in #FF00FF magenta and #00FFFF cyan. Heavy monsoon rain creates vibrant reflections on wet asphalt, while flying vehicles leave #FF6B35 orange light trails across the foggy urban canyon. Volumetric fog, ray-traced reflections, hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, 8k resolution.
